svg.text: Preserved: P-wave (0.5-2 Hz), QRS (5-40 Hz), T-wave (1-5 Hz)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain why the middle portion of the ECG is kept during truncation')
sendPrompt('How does zero-padding work for short ECG recordings?')
